summary: Frontend-only testing of Swiss Brutalist marketing/portfolio site. All requested data-testid elements render, all CTAs (Calendly + WhatsApp) have correct hrefs, smooth-scroll nav works, mobile menu works at <768px, no horizontal overflow at 1440/1024/768/375, all images load successfully, 0 console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: siteConfig.calendlyUrl, whatsappNumber and email are placeholders (calendly.com/your-studio/intro, +1 555-1234567, hello@yourstudio.com) — must be replaced with real client values before launch.
Two duplicate Unsplash images are reused across projects (P-001/P-005 and P-002/P-004; P-003/P-006). Consider using 6 unique project images for a more credible portfolio.

Sticky WhatsApp pill (bottom-right) visually overlaps with the Emergent platform 'Made with Emergent' badge in the preview environment — not a code bug, but in production deployment without the badge it will be fine. Worth keeping in mind if the badge is retained.
Hero outline 'WEBSITES' text uses -webkit-text-stroke style (outline-text class). Verify visibility in older Firefox if cross-browser support is critical.
seed_data_creation: None — static site, all data is in /app/frontend/src/lib/siteConfig.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing site (no backend integration on UI). All data-testids verified: nav-* (logo/work/services/process/contact/whatsapp/mobile-toggle/mobile-*), hero-calendly-btn, hero-whatsapp-btn, service-card-S/01..S/06, project-card-P-001..P-006, process-step-01..04, testimonial-0..2, contact-calendly-btn, contact-whatsapp-btn, faq-0..2, site-footer, footer-instagram/linkedin/x/email, sticky-whatsapp. Calendly URL: https://calendly.com/your-studio/intro; WhatsApp: https://wa.me/15551234567. Mobile menu opens at width<768.
